title: 王者の戦い～ラーメン編～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An alluring aroma draws me into a ramen shop on
my day off. After passing through the door, I spot
a familiar face.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Running away, are you? Whilst the battle for the
crown is yet to be concluded?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The question begs its answer—who among us two
lords is to be crowned the Ramen King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You are not listening! I'm telling you that speed
eating ramen is beneath kingly conduct!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: However... I cannot ignore your brazen words!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you the honor of a personal lesson! No
matter the contest... I am the true king of kings!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah... Allow me to demonstrate the difference
between you and I. For I am the Overlord... the
lord of all kings!
choice_data_list: Why am I not recording this?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! Come to spectate on this kingly
contest, have you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Burn this moment into your memory,
for it will be the moment I conquer all to become
the unquestioned sovereign!
choice_data_list: You two should bring out that fervor in a race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You know how to stoke the competitive fire.
...What do you say, King?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I say you're on. We'll continue this on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like the steam from a bowl of cooling ramen,
their combative tension curiously fades.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Victory... shall be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, their speed eating contest to decide the
king of kings gets underway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sluuurp! Gulp! By one topping, I am vic—augh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch. Ohohoho! That is what happens when you overdo—ngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: THUD!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They've pushed their stomachs to the limit,
collapsing as a result. Just as I'm wondering how
I'm going to roll them both out of here...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Chef! Another two bowls for the Ramen King
contest, please! ♪

text_block_list.name: The Two Vying Kings
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I stare absentmindedly into the distance, I
realize that even at the top, there is always
someone better.
